0.jpg.title: Mirza Ghalib
0.jpg.description: A visualization of Mirza Ghalib's poetic environment, depicting him writing in a traditional 19th-century haveli (mansion) setting in Delhi, surrounded by candlelight and historical architecture.

1.jpg.title: William Wordsworth
1.jpg.description: A visualization of William Wordsworth's poetic environment, showing a solitary figure (representing the poet) walking in the rugged Lake District fells at dusk, overlooking a lake and wild daffodils.
